title: AI documentation for Unity Catalog tables and columns now uses the same model as Databricks Assistant
body:
AI documentation for Unity Catalog tables and table columns now uses a Databricks-hosted model:

* If you already use a Databricks-hosted model for Assistant, there is no change.
* If you turn off **Partner-powered AI features**, AI documentation now stays available and uses a Databricks-hosted model.

For more information, see:

* [Partner-powered AI features](/aws/en/databricks-ai/partner-powered)
* [Add AI-generated comments to Unity Catalog objects](/aws/en/comments/ai-comments)

ref_links.text: Add AI-generated comments to Unity Catalog objects
